description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy sandal from catwalk makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it looks great with all kinds of clothing. Upper Leather thong style straps with nubuck lining Leather toe separator Stitch detailing aling the straps Nubuck footbed for comfort and durability Outsole Durable rubber outsole with concentric lugs for absolute grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Slipper care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
